display.purpose: Homepage hero only — the bold typographic statement that lands the 5-second smile.

headline.purpose: h2 inside posts and page titles.

title.purpose: h3 / h4, featured-card titles, sub-section headers.

body.purpose: All reading prose. Cap line length at 62ch in .prose; never exceed 75ch.

label.purpose: Section labels, tags, dates, file paths, code. JetBrains Mono uppercase tracked.

script.purpose: Caveat — gutter notes only, rotated ±5°. Never used for content the reader needs to parse.

shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: The breath under a featured card at rest. Almost invisible; signals 'this is liftable' without lifting.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Featured card on :hover, paired with translateY(-2px). Reads as pinned by the cursor, not floating.

shadows.name: polaroid-pin
shadows.purpose: Physical-object shadow on washi-taped polaroids — near + diffuse stack reads as an actual photograph pressed onto a page.

shadows.name: system-1-drop
shadows.purpose: 1-bit retro Mac drop on the System-1 Currently widget. Skeuomorph; only this widget uses it.

motion.name: easing-out
motion.purpose: Default for all interactive entrances and hovers.

motion.name: easing-in-out
motion.purpose: State changes that need symmetric in/out.

motion.name: easing-ease
motion.purpose: Nightfall token transition (color blends naturally either direction).

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Featured grid switches to 2-col; ToC repositions; margins step to --ma-wide.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: ToC becomes sticky sidebar; margins step to --ma-vast; hover states enabled.

breakpoints.name: xl
breakpoints.purpose: Max content container reached (--layout-max). Hero left margin-note translates outside the column to read as a true marginal annotation.

components.name: Accent Link
components.description: The site's only 'button' — text in matcha with a 1px underline. The reading surface contains zero button chrome.
components.css: .ds-accent-link { color: var(--color-accent, oklch(0.45 0.10 155)); text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-thickness: 1px; text-underline-offset: 0.15em; font-family: 'Sora', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; transition: color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-accent-link:hover { color: var(--color-accent-hover, oklch(0.44 0.11 155)); } .ds-accent-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent, oklch(0.45 0.10 155)); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Type Tag
components.description: Optional post-type label rendered only when frontmatter has type:. Mono caps with a thin border, never a pill.
components.css: .ds-type-tag { display: inline-block; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-text-tertiary, oklch(0.55 0.015 60)); letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 2px 6px; border: 1px solid currentColor; border-radius: 3px; background: transparent; }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: FEATURED ——, RECENT ——, CURRENTLY ——. Mono uppercase tracked, with literal trailing em-dashes as a typographic glyph.
components.css: .ds-section-label { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.14em; color: var(--color-text-secondary, oklch(0.45 0.02 60)); line-height: 1.5; margin: 0 0 24px 0; }

components.name: Featured Card
components.description: Surface-alt bed with a washi-tape strip pinned at one corner. Sharp corners, 1px border, lifts on hover. Whole card is one anchor with aria-labelledby pointing at the title.
components.html:
PROJECTApr 02, 2026

An ESP32, a DHT22, and a stubborn Wi-Fi rejoin loop

Notes from a small sensor I built for the koubou shelf. The bug was in my head, not the radio.
components.css: .ds-featured-card { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: var(--color-surface-alt, oklch(0.91 0.018 80)); padding: 24px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border, oklch(0.85 0.01 80)); border-radius: 3px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.04); text-decoration: none; color: var(--color-text-primary, oklch(0.22 0.02 60)); font-family: 'Sora', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: box-shadow 200ms ease-out, transform 200ms ease-out; } .ds-featured-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 12px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.08); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-featured-card:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent, oklch(0.45 0.10 155)); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-washi-tape { position: absolute; top: -10px; left: 40px; width: 90px; height: 18px; background: repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, oklch(0.75 0.08 155 / 0.55) 0 6px, oklch(0.85 0.05 155 / 0.35) 6px 12px); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.08); rotate: -6deg; } .ds-card-meta { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: baseline; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-date { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--color-text-tertiary, oklch(0.55 0.015 60)); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Sora', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; color: var(--color-text-primary, oklch(0.22 0.02 60)); } .ds-card-description { display: -webkit-box; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--color-text-secondary, oklch(0.45 0.02 60)); line-height: 1.5; margin-top: 8px; -webkit-line-clamp: 3; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; }

components.name: Post Row
components.description: Tabular post-list row: title + optional TypeTag + JetBrains Mono date, dotted divider above. Whole row is one anchor with aria-labelledby pointing at the title.
components.html: Final Fantasy Tactics, twenty-three years lateREFLECTIONMar 21, 2026
components.css: .ds-post-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto auto; align-items: baseline; gap: 16px; padding: 8px 0; border-top: 1px dotted var(--color-border, oklch(0.85 0.01 80)); text-decoration: none; color: var(--color-text-primary, oklch(0.22 0.02 60)); font-family: 'Sora', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-post-row:hover .ds-post-title { color: var(--color-accent, oklch(0.45 0.10 155)); } .ds-post-row:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent, oklch(0.45 0.10 155)); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-post-title { font-size: 1rem; min-width: 0; transition: color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-post-date { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--color-text-secondary, oklch(0.45 0.02 60)); white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Margin Note
components.description: Caveat handwriting in the gutter, rotated ±5°, drawn in margin-ink. Lives inside a real <aside> with aria-label, never display: contents.
components.html:
(the tabs are
a feature →)his name
is Nuno
components.css: .ds-margin-note-host { position: relative; display: block; height: 0; } .ds-margin-note { position: absolute; font-family: 'Caveat', cursive; font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 1.4; color: var(--color-margin-ink, oklch(0.40 0.04 40)); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-margin-note--left { left: 0; top: 8px; rotate: -3deg; } .ds-margin-note--right { right: 0; top: 32px; rotate: 4deg; color: var(--color-accent, oklch(0.45 0.10 155)); }

components.name: Nightfall Toggle
components.description: Day/nightfall mode switch. Single ◐ glyph, role=switch, aria-checked. The only binary control on the site.
components.html: <button type="button" class="ds-nightfall-toggle" role="switch" aria-checked="false" aria-label="Alternar modo noturno">◐</button>
components.css: .ds-nightfall-toggle { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 36px; height: 36px; padding: 0; background: transparent; color: var(--color-text-secondary, oklch(0.45 0.02 60)); font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 1; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 3px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-nightfall-toggle:hover { color: var(--color-text-primary, oklch(0.22 0.02 60)); } .ds-nightfall-toggle:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent, oklch(0.45 0.10 155)); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Code Inline
components.description: Inline <code> on a code-surface tint. Slightly darker than the page, never gray.
components.html: install via bun install astro and you're set.
components.css: .ds-prose-line { font-family: 'Sora', system-ui, sans-serif; color: var(--color-text-primary, oklch(0.22 0.02 60)); margin: 0; } .ds-code-inline { background: var(--color-code-surface, oklch(0.94 0.008 80)); font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.9em; padding: 0.15em 0.35em; border-radius: 3px; color: var(--color-text-primary, oklch(0.22 0.02 60)); }

components.name: Nav (fa. wordmark)
components.description: Persistent top nav. fa. wordmark with the period in matcha + page links + nightfall toggle. No hamburger, ever.
components.html:
fa.
  • Home
  • Posts
  • About
  • Search
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 16px 0; font-family: 'Sora', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-brand { color: var(--color-text-primary, oklch(0.22 0.02 60)); font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.25rem; text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-nav-brand-dot { color: var(--color-accent, oklch(0.45 0.10 155)); } .ds-nav-list { display: flex; gap: 24px; align-items: center; list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; } .ds-nav-link { color: var(--color-text-secondary, oklch(0.45 0.02 60)); text-decoration: none; font-size: 1rem; padding: 8px 0; transition: color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: var(--color-text-primary, oklch(0.22 0.02 60)); } .ds-nav-link[aria-current='page'] { color: var(--color-accent, oklch(0.45 0.10 155)); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible, .ds-nav-brand:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent, oklch(0.45 0.10 155)); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-nightfall-toggle { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 36px; height: 36px; padding: 0; background: transparent; color: var(--color-text-secondary, oklch(0.45 0.02 60)); font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 1; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 3px; cursor: pointer; }

narrative.northStar: The Koubou — a small workshop on cream paper.
narrative.overview: A personal workshop, not a marketing site and never a dev-blog template. The page should read like a notebook page that survived a coffee: cream surface, warm-black ink, soft borders, mono in the captions, a Caveat note in the gutter, the occasional washi-taped feature card or eki-stamp. The Japanese craft DNA — Muji restraint, risograph warmth, ma spacing — is felt through paper, breathing room, and named scale, never announced through CJK glyphs or stereotype iconography. FA is Brazilian and doesn't read Japanese; performative kanji is forbidden. The site rejects every template tell that personal sites converge on: SaaS-cream landing pages, identical card grids, hero-metric templates, gradient text, 'Read more →' affordances, hamburger menus on desktop, dark-mode-by-inversion, newsletter modals. Restraint is the signal. One flower in a vase: the matcha accent shows up sparingly so it still lands when it appears.
keyCharacteristics: Paper before pixels — cream surface (oklch(0.96 0.012 80)), never #fff.
Borders, not shadows — 1px lifts cards; shadows belong to things actually pinned (washi tape, polaroids, eki-stamps).
Marginalia in Caveat — a wink, an aside, never replacing meaning with handwriting.
Mono for metadata — JetBrains Mono on dates, tags, labels, code, file paths.
Ma is structure — every gap is a named token, never an arbitrary px.
Quiet by default — no auto-play motion, no parallax; motion responds to intent.
Nightfall is designed, not computed — warm indigo with amber lanterns, parallel to day.

rules.name: The One-Flower Rule
rules.body: No page renders more than three matcha-accent elements simultaneously in the viewport. :focus-visible rings are exempt — accessibility never counts against accent budget. If a fourth element wants accent, something else gives it up.

rules.name: The Tinted-Neutral Rule
rules.body: No #000 and no #fff anywhere. Every neutral is tinted toward the warm hue family (60–80 day, 280 nightfall). A cool gray on this page would read as foreign object.

rules.name: The Marginalia-Never-Means Rule
rules.body: Washi tape, polaroid frames, post-it yellow, hanko red, and other atom hues are personality, not information. Never use them to indicate state, type, or status. The reader can ignore every marginalia hue and lose nothing.

rules.name: The Three-Faces Rule
rules.body: Sora carries personality and prose; JetBrains Mono carries metadata; Caveat carries marginalia. Faces never trade jobs. Caveat in body copy is forbidden. Mono in headlines is forbidden. Sora on a date is forbidden.

rules.name: The 62ch Rule
rules.body: Reading prose is capped at 62ch (.prose max-width). Sustained reading lives in the comfort zone; longer measures degrade focus, shorter ones break rhythm.

rules.name: The Section-Label Em-Dash Exception
rules.body: Body copy bans em dashes. Section labels keep them — FEATURED ——, RECENT —— — because the trailing em-dashes are a typographic glyph, part of the label's silhouette, not punctuation in a sentence. They appear only in mono uppercase labels.

rules.name: The Borders-Not-Shadows Rule
rules.body: Containers lift via 1px borders and surface-alt tints. Shadows are reserved for objects that should feel physically pinned, taped, stamped, or hovered. A 'card with a shadow' without a physical metaphor is forbidden.

rules.name: The Glassmorphism Veto
rules.body: No backdrop-filter: blur() as decoration. No translucent glass cards. Translucency exists only on washi-tape semi-transparency (where the paper grain is the point) and on --color-accent-tint (where the alpha is the structural feature). Decorative blur is never the answer.

dos: Do keep the matcha accent on ≤3 simultaneous elements per viewport (the One-Flower Rule). Focus rings exempt.
Do write all colors in oklch() and tint neutrals to hue 60–80 (day) or 280 (nightfall).
Do lift surfaces with 1px solid var(--color-border) and --color-surface-alt; reserve shadows for things physically pinned, taped, or stamped.
Do use Sora for prose, JetBrains Mono for metadata, Caveat strictly for marginalia. Three faces, three jobs.
Do snap every gap to a named --ma-* token. If a value isn't named, it doesn't ship.
Do cap reading prose at 62ch (.prose max-width).
Do rotate margin notes ±5° and place them in real <aside> landmarks with descriptive aria-label.
Do wrap card / row anchors with aria-labelledby pointing at the title id so screen readers read just the title, not the whole card.
Do design nightfall as a parallel palette (warm indigo + amber lantern), not as an inversion or auto-filter: invert(1).
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: reduce at every motion tier; the nightfall toggle and page transitions degrade to instant swap.
Do verify WCAG 2.1 AA contrast on every text/surface pair in both modes before shipping.
donts: Don't ship #000 or #fff anywhere — they read as foreign objects on cream.
Don't put kanji (or any CJK glyph) in surface UI. The koubou idea lives in design DNA, never in performative typography. (FA is Brazilian; visible kanji is the bazinga rule violation.)
Don't use Caveat for body copy, Mono for headlines, or Sora for dates. Three faces, three jobs.
Don't add SaaS-template patterns: card grids of identical icon+heading+text tiles, hero-metric blocks, gradient-text headlines, 'Read more →' affordances, Substack/Medium clones.
Don't add hamburger menus on desktop (or anywhere — the link list scales mobile-first).
Don't use side-stripe border-left/border-right >1px as an accent on cards, callouts, or alerts. Rewrite with a full border, a tint, or a leading icon.
Don't apply background-clip: text gradients to type. Solid color only; emphasis via weight or size.
Don't decorate with backdrop-filter: blur(). Glassmorphism is never the answer here.
Don't modal-as-first-thought. The site has zero modals; recovery flows (404, no-results) are inline.
Don't auto-play motion or parallax. Motion is reactive — a hover, a click, a toggle — never ambient.
Don't use newsletter modals, cookie banners, tracking beacons, or any anxiety-inducing chrome. Trust is manifested as absence.

Don't write em-dashes (or --) in body copy or UI strings — typographic AI-tell. Use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses. The trailing —— in section labels is the only sanctioned use, because there it's a glyph silhouette, not punctuation.
Don't ship 'in the realm of', 'delve into', inflated symbolism, or rule-of-three flourishes. All copy follows humanizer anti-AI patterns.
Don't synthesize a 'dark mode' by inverting day-mode tokens. Nightfall has its own designed palette.
Don't display empty-state placeholder cards or 'coming soon' badges. The space contracts; absence is graceful.
